name: agentic-workflows
description: Mikey's personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: ideate
plugins.description: Flesh out ideas through relentless questioning, assumption challenging, domain research, and cross-functional agent team execution

plugins.name: rca
plugins.description: Perform thorough root cause analysis on bugs and regressions — find the REAL underlying cause, not just the symptom

plugins.name: semver
plugins.description: Semantic versioning lifecycle management with auto-bump, changelog generation, and version-aware Claude Code hooks

plugins.name: pilot
plugins.description: Autonomous execution harness — decomposes plans into stories, runs generator-evaluator loops, manages sessions with auto-resume

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Graph memory interface backed by memlayer — stores entities, relationships, and decisions with local JSONL cache and semantic search recall
